info.title: Archura Core API
info.description: Identity, ownership, and component-session API for Archura. Production /v1 requests require the Worker service credential plus any endpoint-specific bearer credential.

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: Business and billing boundaries shared by account members

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Organization trial, entitlement, and subscription management

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Platform-owner organization inspection, design forks, and free-plan administration

ServiceAuth.name: X-Archura-Service-Authorization
ServiceAuth.description: Worker credential including the Bearer prefix, for example `Bearer svc_live_...`. Required in production and optional in direct local development.

BearerAuth.description: Platform-admin key, organization secret key, or account session token, according to the operation.

InternalAuth.description: Internal Worker credential. Customer and account-session credentials are rejected.

message.example: The organization API key is invalid.

edge_claim_token.description: Optional opaque edge namespace credential, limited to 128 UTF-8 bytes. Stored for the organization binding and never returned.

secret_key.description: Returned once. Never place this key in a browser or artifact.

external_user_id.description: Optional organization-owned user reference. Never written to operational or audit logs.

access_token.description: Short-lived browser bearer token. Returned once and stored only as a hash.

token.description: Returned once and stored only as a hash.

organization_id.description: Defaults to the account's default organization when omitted.

free_trial_days.description: Accepted only before trial_started_at is set.

trial_ends_at.description: Accepted only after trial start; also sets serve_grace_ends_at to this instant.

component_path.description: An exact path from Core's component registry. Defaults to pages/Landing only when omitted.

expired.description: True only for an unused confirmation whose TTL elapsed.

PaymentRequired.description: The organization needs the Basic plan for this component

post.description: Public callback authenticated with the Stripe-Signature header. Processing is idempotent and refreshes subscription state from Stripe.

post.summary: Create an organization and issue API keys
post.description: Legacy platform-admin route. The returned organization secret is shown once.
Requires the organization secret. Price and redirect configuration are stored server-side and later bound to component sessions.

post.summary: Mint a short-lived component bearer token
post.description: Called by the organization backend after it authenticates its own user. The token is bound to the organization, component, checkout:create scope, checkout audience, origin, and ten-minute expiry.

post.summary: Consume a confirmation and create an account session

get.summary: Return the current account and its organizations

post.summary: Create another organization for the current account

201.description: Organization created; secret_key is returned once

post.summary: Invite an email address to an organization as a member

201.description: Invitation created or refreshed and its notification sent

post.description: Idempotent. Any organization member may start the trial immediately before the first publish.

post.summary: Create a design in the organization
post.description: Account session with organization membership. Enforces the plan's design cap; the content itself lives in R2.

get.summary: Fetch a single design owned by the organization
Return the organization's current edit and serving entitlement
get.description: Service-authenticated Worker lookup. Account role is intentionally omitted, so can_manage_billing is false.

post.summary: Authorize a declared component manifest before publication
post.description: Internal Worker operation. Unknown registry paths fail closed. The organization ID must come from trusted site or design metadata.

post.summary: Create a Stripe Checkout session for the $5 monthly plan
post.description: Organization owners only. The configured Stripe Price defines the amount and currency.

post.summary: Create a Stripe customer portal session

delete.summary: Release a site after its billing recovery window
delete.description: Worker service operation used by scheduled recovery cleanup. Idempotently removes the Core ownership binding before R2 artifacts are deleted.

204.description: Ownership binding released or already absent

post.summary: Accept an invitation addressed to the current account email
Decline an invitation addressed to the current account email

post.description: Best-effort and idempotent. Missing, malformed, unknown, expired, or already-revoked account session tokens still return 204 so the Worker can always clear its cookie.

post.summary: Bind a subdomain to one of the current account's organizations

get.summary: Check whether an organization row exists
Look up the organization bound to a subdomain
Return the Core environment for the operations UI
Inspect an account and its deletion impact

delete.summary: Delete an account and its sole-member organizations

post.summary: Create an idempotent pending fork record
Finalize a pending or failed fork

get.summary: Get defaults copied to future organizations
List recent in-memory confirmation messages in development
